_comment: Synthetic fixture for SLFEMPUK-34: a historical Self-Employment Business v5 periodic update JSON that still carries the fields deprecated by the HMRC changelog on 2026-04-24 (averagingAdjustment) and 2026-05-12 (adjustments.overlapReliefUsed). The MtdPeriodicUpdateClientTest deserialises this fixture into PeriodicUpdate to prove that @JsonIgnoreProperties tolerates legacy persisted data without exception and without ever surfacing the deprecated values to application code.
